name: HIPAA
description: HIPAA Security Rule — administrative, physical, and technical safeguards for ePHI

requirements.requirement_text: Implement policies and procedures to prevent, detect, contain, and correct security violations (Security Management Process).
requirements.expected_evidence: Security policies, risk analysis, sanction policy
requirements.recommendation_text: Establish a formal security management program with documented risk analysis and sanction policy.

requirements.requirement_text: Implement policies and procedures to ensure workforce members have appropriate access to ePHI and prevent unauthorized access.
requirements.expected_evidence: Access authorization procedures, termination checklist, role definitions
requirements.recommendation_text: Document workforce authorization, supervision, and termination procedures for ePHI access.

requirements.requirement_text: Implement policies and procedures for authorizing access to ePHI based on user role and minimum necessary.
requirements.expected_evidence: Access control policy, role matrix, provisioning procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement role-based access with minimum necessary principle for all ePHI systems.

requirements.requirement_text: Implement a security awareness and training program for all workforce members.
requirements.expected_evidence: Training program, completion records, annual training schedule
requirements.recommendation_text: Deliver annual HIPAA security awareness training with documented completion tracking.

requirements.requirement_text: Implement policies and procedures to address security incidents including identification, response, and mitigation.
requirements.expected_evidence: Incident response plan, incident log, breach notification procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Maintain HIPAA incident response procedures including breach assessment and notification.

requirements.requirement_text: Establish policies and procedures for responding to emergencies that damage systems containing ePHI.
requirements.expected_evidence: Contingency plan, DR tests, backup procedures, emergency access
requirements.recommendation_text: Document and test contingency plans including data backup, DR, and emergency mode operations.

requirements.requirement_text: Perform periodic technical and nontechnical evaluations of security policies and controls.
requirements.expected_evidence: Annual security evaluation reports, audit findings, remediation tracking
requirements.recommendation_text: Conduct annual evaluations of HIPAA safeguards with documented remediation.

requirements.requirement_text: Implement policies and procedures to limit physical access to facilities and systems containing ePHI.
requirements.expected_evidence: Physical access policy, visitor logs, facility controls
requirements.recommendation_text: Control physical access to ePHI systems with badges, logs, and visitor procedures.

requirements.requirement_text: Implement policies governing receipt, movement, and disposal of hardware and media containing ePHI.
requirements.expected_evidence: Media disposal policy, destruction certificates, asset tracking
requirements.recommendation_text: Define secure media disposal with certificates of destruction for ePHI media.

requirements.requirement_text: Implement technical policies and procedures allowing only authorized access to ePHI.
requirements.expected_evidence: Technical access controls, unique IDs, session timeout configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Enforce unique user identification, emergency access, automatic logoff, and encryption.

requirements.requirement_text: Implement hardware, software, and procedural mechanisms to record and examine activity in ePHI systems.
requirements.expected_evidence: Audit logging policy, log retention, SIEM configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Enable comprehensive audit logging for all ePHI access with retention and review.

requirements.requirement_text: Implement policies and procedures to protect ePHI from improper alteration or destruction.
requirements.expected_evidence: Integrity controls documentation, change management, hashing
requirements.recommendation_text: Protect ePHI integrity with change controls and tamper detection mechanisms.

requirements.requirement_text: Implement procedures to verify that persons or entities seeking access to ePHI are who they claim to be.
requirements.expected_evidence: Authentication policy, MFA enforcement, password standards
requirements.recommendation_text: Require MFA for remote and privileged access to ePHI systems.

requirements.requirement_text: Implement technical security measures to guard against unauthorized access to ePHI transmitted over networks.
requirements.expected_evidence: Encryption standards, TLS configuration, VPN policy
requirements.recommendation_text: Encrypt all ePHI in transit using TLS 1.2+ and secure VPN for remote access.

requirements.requirement_text: Covered entities shall have contracts or agreements with business associates ensuring appropriate safeguards.
requirements.expected_evidence: Signed BAAs, vendor risk assessments, BA register
requirements.recommendation_text: Execute BAAs with all business associates before sharing ePHI.

requirements.requirement_text: Maintain written policies and procedures and documentation of required actions, activities, and assessments for six years.
requirements.expected_evidence: Policy repository, version control, retention schedule
requirements.recommendation_text: Maintain HIPAA documentation with version control and 6-year retention.

requirements.requirement_text: Conduct an accurate and thorough assessment of potential risks and vulnerabilities to the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of ePHI.
requirements.expected_evidence: Risk analysis report, risk register, remediation plan
requirements.recommendation_text: Perform comprehensive HIPAA risk analysis annually and after significant changes.

requirements.requirement_text: Implement a mechanism to encrypt and decrypt ePHI where reasonable and appropriate (addressable).
requirements.expected_evidence: Encryption policy, at-rest encryption configuration, key management
requirements.recommendation_text: Encrypt ePHI at rest on all systems storing PHI with documented key management.
